title: Private Catamaran in Marbella: Costs, Seasons & Tips for 2026
html:
Chartering a private catamaran in Marbella offers a unique perspective on the Costa del Sol, with prices starting around €2,500 for a full-day cruise from Puerto Banús. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators for skippered charters in Marbella, ensuring a seamless booking experience.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella offers several excellent marinas for boarding a private catamaran, including Puerto Banús, the main harbour in Marbella town, and the nearby ports of Cabopino and Sotogrande. Puerto Banús is the most famous, lined with luxury boutiques and restaurants, and provides direct access to the Mediterranean. Cabopino, east of Marbella, is a smaller, quieter marina close to the Artola sand dunes. Sotogrande, south of Estepona, is a sophisticated resort with a large marina. For day trips, the bay of Marbella offers calm waters, while the nearby island of Isla de las Palomas is a popular snorkelling spot 5 nautical miles offshore. You can skippered charters in Marbella for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right boat depends on your group size and desired experience; private catamarans are ideal for stability and space, while motor yachts offer speed. Here are the top options available through BoatHire24: One option worth a look is the Sunseeker Predator 72 charter page.

  1. Private Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 450), Best for family groups or parties, accommodating up to 12 guests, from €2,500 for a full day.
  2. Motor Yacht (e.g. Sunseeker Predator 72), Ideal for a fast, luxurious experience with up to 8 guests, from €3,000 for half a day; see the Sunseeker Predator 72 charter page for details.
  3. Sailing Yacht (e.g. Sun Odyssey 44), A classic choice for a sailing purist, perfect for 6 guests, from €1,800 for a half-day.
  4. RIB or Tender, Great for a quick coastal exploration or watersports, carrying 6 guests, from €600 for two hours.
  5. Azimut 58 Flybridge, A stylish motor yacht with flybridge, suited for 10 guests, from €2,800 for a half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Boat rental prices in Marbella range from €150 per person for a shared tour to €4,000 for a full-day crewed catamaran. The following breakdown gives a clearer picture:

  • Shared group tour (e.g. sunset sail on a catamaran): from €150 per person.
  • Small motorboat (6, 8 guests, half day without crew): from €600.
  • Private catamaran (10, 12 guests, full day with skipper): from €2,500.
  • Full-day crewed motor yacht (8, 10 guests, with skipper and hostess): from €3,500.

Most operators require a refundable deposit of around €500 to €1,000. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For self-drive hire in Spain, a valid boating licence is required unless the boat is under 5 metres or the engine is under 15 CV. Most private catamarans and yachts are skippered, so no licence is needed for the renter, the skipper handles everything. For bareboat charters, the operator will confirm the exact requirements based on your nationality and the boat specifications. High season runs from June to September, when the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon; mornings are typically calmer. A local tip:

Book a morning charter in August to avoid the Levante wind and enjoy glassy seas off Cabopino.

At a glance

  • Price band: €150 to €4,000 per trip
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I book a private catamaran for my wedding party in Marbella?

Yes, many catamarans accommodate up to 12 guests for wedding celebrations, with catering and decoration arranged through the marina.

What is the cancellation policy for boat rentals in Marbella?

Most operators offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure; after that, a 50% fee may apply.

Are there toilets on board a catamaran in Marbella?

All private catamarans have one or two private cabins with a toilet and shower; motor yachts often have two or three cabins.

Can I bring my own food and drink on the boat?

Yes, most charters allow you to bring your own catering, but some offer onboard catering as an add-on service.

Booking a private catamaran through the BoatHire24 marketplace gives you access to verified operators and transparent pricing for your Marbella adventure. Whether you are a first-time renter or an experienced sailor, the platform simplifies your search. If you own a boat in Marbella, consider listing your vessel to reach thousands of potential customers worldwide.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
